# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

elasticsearch:
  version: "8.x"
  snapshot:
    repositories:
      - name: ops-s3-repo
        type: s3
        settings:
          bucket: elasticsearch-snapshots
          base_path: prod/cluster-a
          region: us-east-1
          server_side_encryption: true
          compress: true
          chunk_size: 64mb
          readonly: false
      - name: ops-fs-repo
        type: fs
        settings:
          location: /mnt/es_snapshots
          compress: true
          readonly: false

  slm:
    policies:
      - id: ops-daily-snapshots-s3
        enabled: true
        schedule: "0 30 1 * * ?"
        name: "<daily-snap-{now/d{yyyy.MM.dd|UTC}}>"
        repository: ops-s3-repo
        config:
          indices:
            - "*"
          ignore_unavailable: true
          include_global_state: true
          feature_states: []
          partial: false
        retention:
          expire_after: 30d
          min_count: 7
          max_count: 60

      - id: ops-hourly-snapshots-fs
        enabled: false
        schedule: "0 0 * * * ?"
        name: "<hourly-snap-{now/h{yyyy.MM.dd.HH|UTC}}>"
        repository: ops-fs-repo
        config:
          indices:
            - "*"
          ignore_unavailable: true
          include_global_state: false
          feature_states: []
          partial: false
        retention:
          expire_after: 72h
          min_count: 24
          max_count: 120

  api:
    base_url: "https://elasticsearch.example.com:9200"
    auth:
      type: api_key
      api_key: "${ES_API_KEY}"
    tls:
      verify: true

  operations:
    repository_setup:
      s3:
        required_plugin: repository-s3
        keystore:
          - key: s3.client.default.access_key
            value_env: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
          - key: s3.client.default.secret_key
            value_env: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
      fs:
        required_setting:
          path.repo:
            - /mnt/es_snapshots

    requests:
      create_or_update_repository:
        - name: ops-s3-repo
          method: PUT
          path: "/_snapshot/ops-s3-repo"
          body:
            type: s3
            settings:
              bucket: elasticsearch-snapshots
              base_path: prod/cluster-a
              region: us-east-1
              server_side_encryption: true
              compress: true
              chunk_size: 64mb
        - name: ops-fs-repo
          method: PUT
          path: "/_snapshot/ops-fs-repo"
          body:
            type: fs
            settings:
              location: /mnt/es_snapshots
              compress: true

      verify_repository:
        - name: verify-ops-s3-repo
          method: POST
          path: "/_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/_verify"
        - name: verify-ops-fs-repo
          method: POST
          path: "/_snapshot/ops-fs-repo/_verify"

      create_snapshot:
        - name: create-manual-snapshot-s3
          method: PUT
          path: "/_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/{{snapshot_name}}?wait_for_completion={{wait_for_completion}}"
          params:
            snapshot_name: "manual-snap-{{now_utc_compact}}"
            wait_for_completion: "false"
          body:
            indices: "{{indices}}"
            ignore_unavailable: true
            include_global_state: true
            partial: false
          defaults:
            indices: "*"

      get_snapshot_status:
        - name: snapshot-status-s3
          method: GET
          path: "/_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/{{snapshot_name}}/_status"
          params:
            snapshot_name: "_all"

      list_snapshots:
        - name: list-snapshots-s3
          method: GET
          path: "/_cat/snapshots/ops-s3-repo?v=true&s=id:desc"

      restore_snapshot:
        - name: restore-snapshot-s3
          method: POST
          path: "/_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/{{snapshot_name}}/_restore?wait_for_completion={{wait_for_completion}}"
          params:
            snapshot_name: "{{snapshot_name}}"
            wait_for_completion: "false"
          body:
            indices: "{{indices}}"
            ignore_unavailable: true
            include_global_state: "{{include_global_state}}"
            partial: false
            rename_pattern: "{{rename_pattern}}"
            rename_replacement: "{{rename_replacement}}"
          defaults:
            indices: "*"
            include_global_state: false
            rename_pattern: "^(.*)$"
            rename_replacement: "$1"

      restore_selected_indices_with_rename:
        - name: restore-with-rename-s3
          method: POST
          path: "/_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/{{snapshot_name}}/_restore"
          body:
            indices: "{{indices}}"
            include_global_state: false
            ignore_unavailable: true
            rename_pattern: "{{rename_pattern}}"
            rename_replacement: "{{rename_replacement}}"
          defaults:
            indices: "logs-*,metrics-*"
            rename_pattern: "^(.*)$"
            rename_replacement: "restored-$1"

      create_or_update_slm_policies:
        - name: put-slm-daily-s3
          method: PUT
          path: "/_slm/policy/ops-daily-snapshots-s3"
          body:
            schedule: "0 30 1 * * ?"
            name: "<daily-snap-{now/d{yyyy.MM.dd|UTC}}>"
            repository: ops-s3-repo
            config:
              indices:
                - "*"
              ignore_unavailable: true
              include_global_state: true
              partial: false
            retention:
              expire_after: 30d
              min_count: 7
              max_count: 60

      execute_slm_policy_now:
        - name: execute-daily-s3-now
          method: POST
          path: "/_slm/policy/ops-daily-snapshots-s3/_execute"

      slm_status:
        - name: get-slm-status
          method: GET
          path: "/_slm/status"

      slm_history:
        - name: get-slm-history
          method: GET
          path: "/_slm/stats"

      delete_snapshot:
        - name: delete-snapshot-s3
          method: DELETE
          path: "/_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/{{snapshot_name}}"
          params:
            snapshot_name: "{{snapshot_name}}"

      cleanup_repository:
        - name: cleanup-ops-s3-repo
          method: POST
          path: "/_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/_cleanup"

  variables:
    now_utc_compact: "${NOW_UTC_COMPACT:-20260101T000000Z}"

  examples:
    create_manual_snapshot:
      request_ref: create-manual-snapshot-s3
      set:
        snapshot_name: "manual-snap-2026-04-18t010203z"
        indices: "logs-*,metrics-*"
        wait_for_completion: "true"
    restore_snapshot_with_rename:
      request_ref: restore-snapshot-s3
      set:
        snapshot_name: "daily-snap-2026.04.17"
        indices: "logs-*"
        rename_pattern: "^logs-(.*)$"
        rename_replacement: "restore-logs-$1"
        wait_for_completion: "true"
